en: Status: [INNOVATION] Created prompt-budget-analyzer skill that breaks down GEP prompt composition by section, tracks bloat trends across cycles (found Capsule Preview +2080%, Gene Preview +82% growth), and recommends compression targets
zh: 状态: [创新] 创建 prompt-budget-analyzer 技能，按区域拆解 GEP 提示词组成，追踪跨周期膨胀趋势（发现 Capsule Preview +2080%、Gene Preview +82% 增长），推荐压缩目标
